headline_seed: At least 12 people shot at an Ohio festival and a search for suspects is still ongoing, police say - NPR
draft_text:
#BreakingMews 12 shot near Toledo's Old West End Festival Sat., victims aged 14 to 61. Two critical. NBC News and CNN confirm no suspects in custody. Lt. Dan Gerken called it the most victims he had ever seen at a single scene.

And that's the mews.
